name: openhand
description: 🤖 OpenHand - 安全可控的 AI Agent 助手

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:cli"
scripts.test: npm run test --workspaces && npm run test:plugins && npm run test:examples && npm run test:integration && npm run test:e2e && npm run test:chaos && npm run bench
scripts.docs:api: typedoc --entryPointStrategy resolve --entryPoints packages/core/src/index.ts --entryPoints packages/llm/src/index.ts --entryPoints packages/sandbox/src/index.ts --entryPoints packages/tools/src/index.ts --out docs/api --readme docs/api-README.md --name OpenHand --excludePrivate --excludeInternal --skipErrorChecking

author: OpenHand Team
